{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035746317A4662648CFD455923"}"},"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595765273349931800","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得非常好看。而且非常还原。搞得我有点想林正英了[哭]","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":21,"text":"林正英","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9E%97%E6%AD%A3%E8%8B%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774209466FD455923%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227595765273349931800%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227538649700493167641%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9E%97%E6%AD%A3%E8%8B%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768529791,"group_id":"7538649700493167641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现在作者虽然脑洞大开，但是很忙🌚忙到一整天都没有空更新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5RHx2taw6Z5rI4mzowvac=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c7bdc8d1b4f545309f5758324fad6cb9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787305&x-signature=9LPKvJfPasUBfEBRSLwgturDQn0%3D","user_id":"798660147551860","user_name":"草莓仙女"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"798660147551860","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7538649700493167641","book_info":{"abstract":"秦凡穿越僵尸世界，原身幼时不幸被尸毒感染，被九叔意外救回抚养，十八岁时获得神级选择系统，从此一路开挂起飞。
　　“选择一，真男人从不虚，狱房对掏任老爷1V1，奖励无。”
　　“选择二，成功拜师九叔，继人间道统，扬浩然正气，奖励先天悟道根”
　　从此，僵尸世界多了一尊人间道神，清道门败类，正人间风气。
　　“千鹤师叔，皇族僵尸战你稍退，等会打团我带飞！”
　　“四目师叔，祖师爷还有篇不漏气的请神术！”
　　“石坚师伯，手搓雷法我也会，而且一下就是九道神雷！”
　　若干年后，秦寿身穿紫袍，站道门之巅，望着下方道徒微微一笑。
　　不过是些许风霜罢了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/336d3961eec41bfe43601f7d1f07efd7","author":"迷雾掌柜","author_id":"","book_id":"7538649700493167641","book_name":"拜师九叔，我开局获得神级选择？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9332人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538733141955988504","read_count":"9332","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"965105"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"345","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,系统,九叔,开局,穿越,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c44998c7d0913337f5bab8b49e89c7f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393466&x-signature=Z07TVIepUhk1sVFUB8oMCFORslw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_inf
